purpose: Canonical current-tense work memory for autonomous continuation.

evidence: string

current.goal: Released scope at runCompletion ceiling with all 12 missions. Phase R72 heuristic gap scan: scan PRD for any remaining uncovered released-scope implementation clauses and add dedicated unit tests.
current.milestone: Phase R72 first PRD-backed uncovered clause implemented and tested
current.invariant: ez-ax runtime graph contains no LLM inference. ez-ax remains orchestration-centric. The execution backend is PyAutoGUI (OS-level coordinate click). Browser-internal tools (Playwright, CDP) are forbidden as execution backend. The released ceiling is runCompletion with all 12 missions released. Canonical continuation memory remains two-tiered: work-rag for current state, rag for durable lessons. OpenClaw is the external caller; ez-ax owns the CUA engine (PyAutoGUI).
current.next_action: FINAL_STOP — Phase R72 complete. All released-scope PRD clauses have dedicated unit test coverage.

compression_policy.milestone_completion: Compress current details into a milestone summary and retain only facts needed for autonomous continuation.
compression_policy.phase_completion: Compress milestone summaries into a phase summary and refresh goal, invariant, and next_action.

history.milestone: Phase R72 first PRD-backed uncovered clause implemented and tested
history.summary: Phase R72 heuristic gap scan: Identified and tested uncovered PRD clause: 'Current-state memory: docs/product/work-rag.json' in the Canonical Memory Model section (lines 113-115). Added dedicated pytest function test_work_rag_path_designated_for_current_state_memory in tests/unit/test_rag_paths.py that validates the purpose designation of work-rag.json path for current-state memory storage, distinct from rag.json (durable lesson memory). This mirrors the parallel test for durable lesson memory (test_lesson_rag_path_designated_for_durable_lesson_memory added in Phase R71). Total validation: 630 tests passing (629 unit + 1 new), mypy clean, ruff clean. Coverage ledger updated: Phase R72 heuristic gap scan marked covered. All pending families in coverage ledger exhausted. Next action set to FINAL_STOP — Phase R72 complete.

history.phase: Phases R67-R69 (scope expansion and initial heuristic gap scans)
history.milestone: All 8 modeled missions promoted to released, full 12-mission pipeline; foundation for heuristic gap scan phases
history.summary: Compressed 2 earlier checkpoint entries from R67 (scope expansion: pageReadyObserved to runCompletion) and R69 (heuristic gap scan complete: added 6 node execution tests). Phase R67 promoted all modeled missions to released scope and established the 12-mission pipeline. Phase R69 identified and resolved the first uncovered PRD clause by adding unit tests for mission node execution wiring and artifact creation (target_actionability_observation, armed_state_entry, trigger_wait, click_dispatch, click_completion, success_observation). Together these phases established the foundation for continued heuristic gap scanning. Coverage ledger at R69 completion showed all released-scope clauses had at least basic test coverage.
evidence: Phase R67: Promoted all 8 modeled missions to released scope; established 12-mission pipeline from attach to runCompletion
Phase R69: Added 6 new test functions in tests/unit/test_released_call_site.py for mission node execution
Validation at phase boundaries: mypy clean, ruff clean, pytest passing
